task_completion.description: Open and read the tenant governance specification file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/tenant_governance_spec.md' to read the required resource quotas.
Rancher UI 'Projects/Namespaces' page showing a newly created project named 'Marketing Hub' within the 'local' cluster.
Rancher UI 'Projects/Namespaces' page showing a newly created project named 'Sales Core' within the 'local' cluster.

task_completion.description: Group marketing namespaces into the Marketing Hub project
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing the namespaces 'marketing-site' and 'marketing-analytics' successfully moved under or assigned to the 'Marketing Hub' project.

task_completion.description: Group sales namespaces into the Sales Core project
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing the namespaces 'sales-api' and 'sales-db' successfully moved under or assigned to the 'Sales Core' project.

task_completion.description: Apply Project Resource Quotas to both projects
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing Resource Quotas configured in the Project settings or Project creation screen for both 'Marketing Hub' and 'Sales Core'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rancher web interface to perform the configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent logged into the Rancher UI at https://localhost rather than just modifying text files or mocking the output.

integrity.description: Existing workloads were preserved without deletion
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal commands (e.g., kubectl delete) or Rancher UI actions show the deletion of existing pods, deployments, or workloads in the target namespaces.

integrity.description: Configuration is applied to the actual cluster
integrity.visual_evidence: The project and namespace assignments are visible in the genuine Rancher Cluster Dashboard -> Projects/Namespaces view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The tenant governance specification is located at '/home/ga/Desktop/tenant_governance_spec.md'.
